headline: Phillips 66 (PSX) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Pullback And Strong Longer Term Returns
summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) is drawing attention after recent share price swings, with the stock down about 5% over the past month but still showing strong gains over the past 3 months and year. See our latest analysis for Phillips 66. The recent 5.4% 1 month share price pullback sits against an 18.1% 3 month share price return and a 70.9% 1 year total shareholder return. This suggests momentum has cooled while longer term holders have still been well rewarded. If you are weighing up energy names after...
